modules.name: Spotify Bridge
modules.description: Control playback and get track info from Spotify.

available_commands.get_current: Get info about the currently playing track

modules.name: Media Sentinel
modules.description: Read system-wide media info (SMTC) using Windows native hooks.

available_commands.get_media_info: Get what is currently playing on the system (YouTube, Spotify, etc.)

modules.name: Weather Bridge
modules.description: Get real-time weather data for any location.

available_commands.get_weather: Get current weather info (takes 'location' as optional argument)

available_commands.get_hardware_telemetry: Get system CPU, RAM, and Disk usage stats

modules.name: Screen Capture
modules.description: Take a screenshot of the screen and save it to disk.

available_commands.take_screenshot: Capture a specific monitor (0=all merged, 1=primary, 2+=secondary) and save as PNG. Optional arg: 'monitor' (int).

modules.name: Webcam Capture
modules.description: Captures images from a connected webcam.

available_commands.capture_image: Capture a photo from specified camera (index=0 for default).

modules.name: Web Search
modules.description: Search the internet and return a summary of the top results (powered by DuckDuckGo, no API key required).

available_commands.web_search: Search the web for any query. Takes 'query' (required) and optional 'count' (default 5, max 10) arguments.
